user.title: Add Smart Gate device
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Smart Gate device. You can find it from your router, Smart Gate app, or the device local API.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Smart Gate device discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: Home Assistant found {device_name} on your local network.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Smart Gate device. Make sure it is powered on and connected to the same network.
error.cannot_update_name: Could not update the Smart Gate device name.
error.rename_not_supported: This Smart Gate firmware does not support local device rename yet.
error.unsupported_product: This Smart Gate product is not supported by this integration version.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_in_progress: This Smart Gate device is already being configured.
abort.already_configured: This Smart Gate device has already been added.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Smart Gate device. Make sure it is powered on and connected to the same network.
abort.unsupported_product: This Smart Gate product is not supported by this integration version.
abort.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Smart Gate options
init.description: Change the Smart Gate device name or polling interval. Use this name field when you want the physical device and local network name to update.

error.cannot_update_name: Could not update the Smart Gate device name.
error.rename_not_supported: This Smart Gate firmware does not support local device rename yet.
